description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in manual mode was traveling westbound on 14th Street towards Folsom Street in San Francisco. The 
Zoox vehicle encountered a double-parked vehicle in the lane and went around it. After passing the double-parked vehicle, and as the Zoox 
vehicle was re-entering its travel lane, another parallel-parked passenger car (Vehicle 2) pulled out from a parking space ahead and entered 
the Zoox vehicle's travel path. The front bumper of the Zoox vehicle on the passenger side made contact with the driver's side fender of the 
passenger car. There were no reported injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
